hook.text: Scrum builds software in sprints. DevOps deploys software continuously. They need each other.

buildup.text: Without DevOps, sprint increments pile up waiting for deployment. Value sits on a shelf.

discovery.text: DevOps adds CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and infrastructure as code to Scrum's process.

twist.text: Some teams deploy dozens of times per day — making the two-week sprint feel like a formality.

climax.text: Scrum and DevOps together deliver the Agile promise: working software in users' hands, fast.

punchline.text: Building fast means nothing if shipping is slow.

quiz.question: Why do Scrum teams need DevOps?
options: To continuously deploy what they build in sprints
To replace the Scrum Master role
To eliminate the need for testing
